franky  1.1.4
A High-Level Motion API for Franka

Go to the documentation of this file.
1 #pragma once
2 
3 #include <memory>
4 #include <optional>
5 
6 #include "franky/motion/cartesian_impedance_base.hpp"
7 #include "franky/motion/motion.hpp"
8 #include "franky/motion/torque_control_utils.hpp"
9 #include "franky/types.hpp"
10 #include "franky/wait_free_triple_buffer.hpp"
11 
12 namespace franky {
13 
14 inline Vector7d defaultJointImpedanceStiffness() { return Vector7d::Constant(50.0); }
15 
16 inline Vector7d defaultJointImpedanceDamping(const Vector7d &stiffness) { return 2.0 * stiffness.cwiseSqrt(); }
17 
18 inline Vector7d defaultJointImpedanceDamping() {
19  return defaultJointImpedanceDamping(defaultJointImpedanceStiffness());
20 }
21 
28 struct JointReference {
29  Vector7d q{Vector7d::Zero()};
30  Vector7d dq{Vector7d::Zero()};
31  Vector7d tau_ff{Vector7d::Zero()};
32 
34  void validate() const {
35  validateFinite(q, "q");
36  validateFinite(dq, "dq");
37  validateFinite(tau_ff, "tau_ff");
38  }
39 };
40 
41 struct JointImpedanceGains {
42  JointImpedanceGains() = default;
43 
44  explicit JointImpedanceGains(
45  const std::optional<Vector7d> &stiffness, const std::optional<Vector7d> &damping = std::nullopt)
46  : stiffness(stiffness.value_or(defaultJointImpedanceStiffness())),
47  damping(damping.has_value() ? *damping : defaultJointImpedanceDamping(this->stiffness)) {
48  validate();
49  }
50 
51  Vector7d stiffness{defaultJointImpedanceStiffness()};
52  Vector7d damping{defaultJointImpedanceDamping()};
53 
55  void validate() const {
56  validateNonNegativeFinite(stiffness, "stiffness");
57  validateNonNegativeFinite(damping, "damping");
58  }
59 };
60 
64 struct JointImpedanceParams {
66  Vector7d stiffness{defaultJointImpedanceStiffness()};
67 
69  Vector7d damping{defaultJointImpedanceDamping()};
70 
72  Vector7d error_clip{Vector7d::Constant(0.5)};
73 
75  Vector7d constant_torque_offset{Vector7d::Zero()};
76 
78  bool compensate_coriolis{true};
79 
81  TorqueSafetyParams safety{};
82 
84  FrictionCompensationParams friction{};
85 
87  std::optional<CartesianImpedanceGains> cartesian_gains{std::nullopt};
88 
90  void validate() const {
91  validateNonNegativeFinite(stiffness, "stiffness");
92  validateNonNegativeFinite(damping, "damping");
93  validateNonNegativeFinite(error_clip, "error_clip");
94  if (cartesian_gains.has_value()) {
95  cartesian_gains->validate();
96  }
97  friction.validate();
98  }
99 };
100 
108 class JointImpedanceBase : public Motion<franka::Torques> {
109  public:
110  [[nodiscard]] const Vector7d &target() const { return target_; }
111  [[nodiscard]] const Vector7d &target_velocity() const { return target_velocity_; }
112  [[nodiscard]] const JointImpedanceParams &params() const { return params_; }
113 
114  void setGains(const JointImpedanceGains &gains) {
115  gains.validate();
116  gains_handle_.set(gains);
117  }
118  [[nodiscard]] JointImpedanceGains getGains() const { return gains_handle_.getLastWritten(); }
119 
120  void setCartesianGains(const CartesianImpedanceGains &gains) {
121  gains.validate();
122  cartesian_gains_handle_.set(gains);
123  }
124  [[nodiscard]] CartesianImpedanceGains getCartesianGains() const { return cartesian_gains_handle_.getLastWritten(); }
125 
126  protected:
127  explicit JointImpedanceBase(
128  const Vector7d &target, const Vector7d &target_velocity, const JointImpedanceParams &params,
129  double gains_time_constant = 0.1);
130 
131  [[nodiscard]] franka::Torques computeCommand(
132  const RobotState &robot_state, const JointReference &reference, double dt);
133 
134  JointImpedanceParams params_;
135  Vector7d target_;
136  Vector7d target_velocity_;
137 
138  private:
139  struct CartesianShapingState {
140  Matrix6d stiffness;
141  Matrix6d damping; // always concrete, interpolated
142  Matrix6d critical_damping; // cached critical(stiffness)
143  std::optional<Matrix6d> critical_damping_stiffness; // stiffness the cache was computed for
144  };
145 
146  // Critical damping for the shaping stiffness; recomputes the eigendecomposition only while the
147  // stiffness moves and caches it otherwise.
148  static const Matrix6d &criticalShapingDamping(CartesianShapingState &shaping);
149 
150  WaitFreeTripleBuffer<JointImpedanceGains> gains_handle_;
151  WaitFreeTripleBuffer<CartesianImpedanceGains> cartesian_gains_handle_;
152  double gains_time_constant_;
153  Vector7d current_stiffness_;
154  Vector7d current_damping_;
155  std::optional<CartesianShapingState> cartesian_shaping_;
156 };
157 
158 } // namespace franky
